github.description: Official GitHub MCP server (github/github-mcp-server). Set --read-only by default in this project; switch off for write ops on PRs/issues only when needed.

shadcn.description: Official shadcn/ui MCP server. Auto-activates when components.json is present in frontend/. REI-1 compliant.

playwright.description: Microsoft Playwright MCP. Browser automation via accessibility snapshots. Heavy on tokens; prefer @playwright/cli for batch runs.

postgres.description: Postgres MCP Pro by Crystal DBA. RESTRICTED mode = read-only + EXPLAIN + schema introspection. pgvector support not officially confirmed on landing — verify before relying on it. Last release v0.3.0 (2025-05-16, >6 months at install time).

codegraph.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph (tree-sitter -> SQLite FTS5). 100% local. Tools: codegraph_context / codegraph_search / codegraph_callers / codegraph_callees / codegraph_impact. Claude re-runs `npx @colbymchenry/codegraph index` automatically after any structural change (REI-15).

chrome-devtools.description: Official Chrome DevTools MCP (40k+ stars). Gives Claude a real Chromium browser for inspect/debug/perf-trace/network. 6 companion skills installed in .claude/skills/cdt-*. Critical for PHASE 6 (frontend QA) and PHASE 7 (Core Web Vitals pre-deploy).
